examples: He became a colossus of the labour movement.
In 1999, Citigroup was the newly formed colossus.
In this company, Angela Merkel ought to be a colossus.
Colossus marks a departure from the relatively traditional pop-rock sound of RJD2's 2007 album, The Third Hand.
However, Ulster Unionist Party leader Mike Nesbitt said Baroness Thatcher was "a colossus of conviction politics".
